items.claim: Conor McGregor has only one win in the last nine years.
items.quote: He has like one win in the last nine years

items.claim: Conor McGregor is coming off a gruesome injury.
items.quote: coming off of a gruesome injury.

items.claim: If the fight reaches the second round, it will heavily favor Max Holloway.
items.quote: if this gets extended, if this reaches the second round, it will heavily heavily heavily favor Max Holloway.

items.claim: Max Holloway is one of the most durable fighters in UFC history.
items.quote: knock out one of the most durable guys in UFC history

items.claim: Conor McGregor is an incredible hammer but not a good nail.
items.quote: he's always been an incredible hammer, but not the best nail.

items.claim: Conor McGregor lacks the same fire in his eyes that he once had.
items.quote: you just don't see that same fire in his eyes like you once did.
